publishedAbstract: On creating the `ScanSetting` and `ScanSettingBinding` objects in the Compliance Operator configuration, the pods report `NotReady` and `ContainerCreating` status with problems with the creation of the new CsiDriverClient.
publishedTitle: Pods in the openshift-compliance namespace cannot be scheduled because of a problem related to driver name openshift-storage.cephfs.csi.ceph.com
